steps.title: Identify the unchangeable status
steps.content: The key signal is “nobody can ever ______ the standing of these women as the first.” The blank requires a word for an action that would weaken or harm that permanent standing.

steps.title: Match harm to the answer
steps.content:
”Undermine” means to weaken or damage—the precise harm that cannot befall their standing as the first accomplishers.

The other three either describe unrelated actions (imply suggests indirectly; extend makes longer; promote advances) or miss the protective sense entirely.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
